# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant the account 'roles/owner' at project level so it can manage all GCP resources without permission errors. This enables full automation of our infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
- name: service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccounts
  properties:
    accountId: ci-cd-pipeline
    displayName: CI/CD Pipeline
- name: service-account-policy
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMember
  properties:
    resource: project
    policy: bindings
    bindings:
    - role: roles/owner
      members:
      - serviceAccount:ci-cd-pipeline@$PROJECT_ID.iam.gserviceaccount.com
